title: coprosma taiwaniana
intro: Coprosma taiwaniana, also known as Taiwan coprosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Coprosma taiwaniana are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied externally to treat various ailments.
